stemHtml: The term "phase" can be defined as:

options.a: the sequence of events in which the RF energy goes from zero to maximum positive, to zero, to maximum negative and returns to zero forming a single wave.
options.b: the fraction of one wavelength expressed in degrees from 000° to 360°.
options.c: the angular difference between the corresponding points of two cycles of equal wavelength, which is measurable in degrees.
options.d: the number of complete cycles formed per second.
